SEARCH
Package server.dao

Class ParameterChangeDAO

java.lang.Object
server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
public class ParameterChangeDAO extends Object
Data access object for the parameter_change_request table — the persistence behind the park-parameter approval workflow.

Follows the same conventions as ReservationDAO: each method opens a short-lived Connection from DBConnection, runs parameterized statements, and maps rows to ParameterChangeRequestDTO. SQL exceptions are logged and surfaced as a null/empty-list/false/-1 return rather than being propagated, so callers signal failure through the return value.

  • Field Details

    • SELECT_WITH_PARK

      private static final String SELECT_WITH_PARK
      Columns selected by listPending() and getById(int), joining the park name and the requester's full name in for display. Order matches map(java.sql.ResultSet). requested_by is a NOT NULL FK to user.id, so the user join is a plain (inner) join — it never drops a request row.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • ParameterChangeDAO

      public ParameterChangeDAO()
      Creates the parameter-change DAO.

  • Method Details

    • insertRequest

      public int insertRequest(int parkId, int requestedBy, ParamField field, int oldValue, int newValue)
      Inserts a new change request in the PENDING state, stamping created_at with the current time.
      Parameters:
      parkId - the park the change targets
      requestedBy - the park manager's user.id
      field - which parameter the change targets
      oldValue - the park's current value for that field
      newValue - the requested new value
      Returns:
      the new auto-generated request id, or -1 if the insert fails

    • listPending

      public List<ParameterChangeRequestDTO> listPending()
      Lists every request still awaiting a decision, oldest first.
      Returns:
      the pending requests (possibly empty); never null

    • getById

      public ParameterChangeRequestDTO getById(int id)
      Looks up a single change request by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - the request identifier to fetch
      Returns:
      the matching request, or null if no row matches or the query fails

    • decide

      public boolean decide(int id, ChangeStatus status, int decidedBy)
      Records a decision (approve/reject) on a request, stamping decided_by and decided_at.

      State guard. The update only fires WHERE id = ? AND status = 'PENDING', so a request that has already been decided is left untouched and false is returned. Folding the guard into the WHERE clause makes it atomic: two concurrent decisions cannot both win, since only the first update matches a still-PENDING row.

      Parameters:
      id - the request to decide
      status - the decision to record (APPROVED or REJECTED)
      decidedBy - the deciding department manager's user.id
      Returns:
      true if the row was still PENDING and got updated, false if it was already decided, not found, or the query fails

    • map

      private ParameterChangeRequestDTO map(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Maps the current ResultSet row to a ParameterChangeRequestDTO. created_at/decided_at are carried to the client as plain strings since they are display-only.
      Parameters:
      rs - a result set positioned on a joined request row
      Returns:
      the mapped request
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a column read fails
